steps.description: Click the text box labeled "Type a message..." in the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground interface to begin entering a message.

parameters.text: How to develop agent for Teams?

steps.description: Type text into the input field at the bottom of the "Microsoft 365 Agents Playground" interface: 'What is Microsoft Teams App?'.
Press the "Enter" key to submit the message "What is Microsoft Teams App?" in the input field at the bottom of the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground chat interface.
Click the "Close" button (X) at the top-right corner of the Google Chrome window to exit the Microsoft Teams web app.
